chapters.title: Intro & recording check
chapters.notes:
Say hello and confirm mic/camera.
"Recording is in progress — we'll share the link after."
Smile, pause 2 seconds.

chapters.title: Who we are
chapters.notes:
Xelto — Oracle JD Edwards partner, Poznań & Warsaw.
One line on what today's session covers.

chapters.title: Agenda overview
chapters.notes:
Walk through the 8 points on screen.
Set expectation: demo + Q&A at the end.

chapters.title: Problem we solve
chapters.notes:
Manual processes, spreadsheet chaos, no single source of truth.
Example: order status tracked in 3 systems.
Transition: "Here's how JDE fixes that."

chapters.title: Demo — login & dashboard
chapters.notes:
Show login screen → main dashboard.
Point at KPI tiles and role-based menu.
Don't drill into every field — keep moving.

chapters.title: Demo — key workflow
chapters.notes:
Pick ONE happy path (e.g. create sales order → approval).
Narrate each click out loud for the recording.

chapters.title: Benefits recap
chapters.notes:
3 bullets max: speed, visibility, integration.
"This is what go-live looks like in week 12."

chapters.title: Q&A buffer
chapters.notes:
If you're watching live — drop questions in chat.
If silent: mention follow-up email xelto@xelto.com

chapters.title: Closing
chapters.notes:
Thank you, next steps, contact slide.
End with: "See you on the next webinar."
